nodes.text: Ah, a new face in town! Be careful out there, adventurer. The dark alley to the south is crawling with vermin. The barkeep might have work for you, too.
Giant rats have been breeding down there. Nasty things. Someone needs to clear them out before they start biting the townsfolk.
What'll it be? We've got ale and stew. If you're looking for trouble, you've come to the right town.
They say the old cemetery south of the alley has been... restless. Bones rattling, lights in the crypt. I'd stay clear if I were you. But you don't look like the cautious type.
The road west leads into the forest. It's safe enough by day, but I wouldn't wander too deep. Wolves, you know. And stranger things.
Ah... a visitor. I don't get many of those. These old bones need a healing herb, but I can no longer make the journey to find one. Would you bring me one? I could make it worth your while.
Bless you, child. Look along the forest paths — the herbs grow where the light breaks through the canopy.
